features.description: Hit points: Dice: d10 per Hit at Level: +your Constitution modifier Points 1st level. Hit at Higher levels: 10 (or 6) your Constitution modifier per level.

features.name: Lay Hands
features.description: A cleric can use a spell slot to touch a creature as an action and expend a number of hit points. The target gains hit points equal to the amount expended, and it can't regain hit points until after it has finished a long rest.

features.name: At 2nd level, you adopt a fighting style.
features.description: You can choose one of the following options: Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, or Protection. You can't take a Fighting Style option more than once.
